_components.$content:
Lasers are a unique kind of energy weapon. Like most energy weapons, they inflict more total damage, do not inflict Bleeding Wounds, and have reduced Armour Penetration, but have exceptional Armour Destruction for their size.

Unlike other energy weapons, lasers fire 4 weaker beams for every shot fired by an equivalent non-laser weapon, and do not require research to regenerate ammunition. Additionally, they are not subject to recoil (except machineguns, which only have half recoil), and have increased accuracy as well as an accuracy bonus for low-accuracy soldiers.

Lasers are not as prone to dissipation as most energy weapons. While they still have a much shorter optimal range than similar ballistic weapons, lasers suffer fairly limited accuracy/damage dropoff allowing them similar range to ballistics; this laser rifle only loses 5% per tile, compared to the 10% of a ballistic rifle.
